description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-accordion: collapsible content sections for FAQ, expandable content. Progressive enhancement with <details>/<summary> fallback. Single and multi-expand modes.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-accordion/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Single and multi-expand modes
- [ ] Animated open/close transitions
- [ ] Progressive enhancement fallback
- [ ] Keyboard: Enter/Space to toggle
- [ ] CSS parts: item, trigger, content, icon
- [ ] Events: hx-expand, hx-collapse
- [ ] ARIA: expanded/hidden states
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** medium
title: Implement hx-accordion component
